description: Memory-capped envelope validation (Profile A: 512 prefill, 128 decode). Produced by benchmark_moe_offload.py with --target-envelope-mb and --strict-gates. Host: 128GB Apple Silicon (synthetic cap, not hard-limited hardware).
note: Qwen3 has only 1.76 GB headroom at 512 prefill tokens. Longer contexts will push peak higher. 16GB-class real hardware validation still required (memory allocator behaviour differs from 128GB host).
